scores.publication: Shrine N et al. Nature Genetics (2019)
scores.license: PGS Catalog terms of use; cite the source publication
limitations: The Catalog reports the weight type as not reported, so score direction is not converted into a higher/lower lung-function claim.
No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled; no percentile is returned.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference must be explicitly disclosed.
Spirometry, symptoms, smoking, respiratory disease, body size, age, sex, altitude, and test technique remain decisive.

scores.license: PGS Catalog terms of use; cite the source publication
limitations: No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled, so no percentile or above/below-average claim is returned; the score is raw only.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference is explicitly disclosed in the coverage QC.
A measured fasting or clinically appropriate lipid panel is decisive; this genetic score is context, not a lipid measurement.
Polygenic scores perform differently across ancestry; development and evaluation ancestries are recorded and cross-population performance is not assumed equal.

scores.publication: Johnson L et al. PLoS One (2015)
scores.license: PGS Catalog terms of use; cite the source publication
limitations: No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled, so no percentile or above/below-average claim is returned; the score is raw only.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference is explicitly disclosed in the coverage QC.
A measured lipid panel is decisive; interpret this only alongside measured HDL, triglycerides, ApoB, and cardiometabolic context.
Polygenic scores perform differently across ancestry; development and evaluation ancestries are recorded and cross-population performance is not assumed equal.

limitations: No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled, so no percentile or above/below-average claim is returned; the score is raw only.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference is explicitly disclosed in the coverage QC.

scores.license: PGS Catalog terms of use; cite the source publication
limitations: No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled, so no percentile or above/below-average claim is returned; the score is raw only.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference is explicitly disclosed in the coverage QC.
HbA1c and fasting glucose, together with age, weight, and family history, are decisive; this is inherited context, not a diagnosis.
Polygenic scores perform differently across ancestry; development and evaluation ancestries are recorded and cross-population performance is not assumed equal.

scores.license: PGS Catalog terms of use; cite the source publication
limitations: The Catalog reports the weight type as not reported, so score direction is not converted into a higher/lower BMI claim.
No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled; no percentile is returned; the score is raw only.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference is explicitly disclosed in the coverage QC.
Measured body composition and metabolic health are decisive; genetic BMI tendency does not set a fixed weight.
